title: Bloom & Serenity UI
description: Modify the original UI interface resource package of Vanilla
body:
Do you want the GUI and HUD in the game to not only have an immersive and colorful atmosphere, but also feature animated effects? Let every time you open an interface become a little surprise～Then this resource pack is prepared for you!
![Dynamic texture!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/283ebce3a858fb8d1244b4454ae1959a1434a9a4.gif)

This resource pack was made for my Modpacks customization and was drawn by [在掐饭的小禾](https://modrinth.com/user/XHeYa_3u3) Of course, you can also use it for your Modpacks.

The animation effect requires the installation of the following mods
[Animatica](https://modrinth.com/mod/animatica)
